title: 18. Companion Orb
description: Companion Orb setup for display, movement, response style prompts, sensory targeting, supervisor rules, and hotkeys.

steps.title: Open Companion Orb
steps.body: Companion Orb has its own addon tab. Its settings are separate from AI Presence, so orb movement, response style, sensory target capture, and supervisor behavior can be tuned without changing the presence overlay. Use Read steps aloud or Read Step in this tutorial panel if you want spoken guidance while you work.

steps.title: Enable and Place the Orb
steps.body: Start with the overlay enabled, a simple display mode, and a predictable position. Use Show Orb before changing many tuning values so you can see exactly what changed.

steps.title: Tune Movement for Awareness, Not Speed
steps.body: Movement settings should make the orb feel aware, not restless. Adjust range, return-home delay, avoid-center, avoid-mouse, and reactivity in small steps so it moves with intent instead of noise.

steps.title: Keep Orb Animation Isolated
steps.body: External runtime for orb animation keeps the animated overlay in a lightweight helper process. Leave it enabled for smoother motion, and only turn it off when diagnosing the bridge itself.

steps.title: Choose the Orb Look
steps.body: Visual style changes the orb renderer while state colors show whether it is idle, thinking, speaking, or observing. Keep style and color edits subtle enough that the orb stays readable over the desktop.

steps.title: Edit Reply Styles
steps.body: Reply styles decide how orb comments sound. Use the style editor to strengthen casual, playful, dry, supportive, or custom commentary without changing the main system prompt.

steps.title: Use Sensory Targeting Carefully
steps.body: Sensory tabs decide what the orb may focus on: selected windows, regions, or broader context. Keep full-screen context opt-in and use target confirmation when testing.

steps.title: Supervisor Rules Are Separate
steps.body: The supervisor section teaches the orb what patterns deserve a reaction. Keep rules specific and sparse so the orb does not compete with Spotify Sense or other hidden sensory sources.

steps.title: Check Hotkeys
steps.body: Orb hotkeys cover toggle, edit mode, placement mode, click-through, clear target, and reset position. Learn these before using the orb over fullscreen apps.
